description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is off
AND games are scheduled to happen today

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND a scheduled game tile does not have focus
steps.result:
THEN the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the scheduled game time displays left-justified below the match-up header
AND below the scheduled game time, the pitching match-up displays with the away pitcher above the home pitcher
AND the away team tri-code displays to the left of the away pitcher's name
AND the home team tri-code displays to the left of the home pitcher's name
AND to the right of the pitcher match-up, gray base icons display above gray outs icons
*************FEATURES BELOW ARE NOT IMPLEMENTED*************
AND below the pitcher match-up, call letters for the available live feeds are displayed
